videoSnippet.title: "Opening Fiasco" || Akiba Rubinstein vs Sergey von Freymann || St. Petersburg (1909)
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Akiba Rubinstein vs Sergey von Freymann
"Opening Fiasco" (game of the day Oct-20-2018)
St. Petersburg (1909), St. Petersburg RUE, rd 16, Mar-08
Queen's Gambit Accepted: Classical Defense. Rubinstein Variation (D27)

1.d4 d5 2.Nf3 Nf6 3.c4 dxc4 4.e3 e6 5.Bxc4 a6 6.O-O c5 7.a4 b6 8.Qe2
Bb7 9.Nc3 Nc6 10.Rd1 Qc7 11.d5 exd5 12.Bxd5 Be7 13.e4 O-O 14.e5 Ne8 15.Qe4 Na5 16.Bxb7

02:00 Game Starts
